english: Swift as the mind, equal in speed to the Wind, master of the senses, foremost among the wise
roman: Manojavam Maruta tulya vegam jitendriyam buddhi matam varishtham

english: Son of the Wind, chief of the monkey hosts, messenger of Shri Rama — I bow my head to him
roman: Vatatmajam Vanara yudha mukhyam Shri Rama dutam shirasa namami

hindi: शान्तिः समृद्धिः शक्तिर्भक्तिः, मारुतेः प्रसादाद् भवतु मे।
english: Peace, prosperity, power and devotion — may they come to me by Maruti's grace
roman: Shantih samriddhih shaktir bhaktih Maruteh prasadad bhavatu me

english: The servant of Rama, devotee of Rama, the dear friend of Shri Rama
roman: Rama dasam Rama bhaktam Shri Ramasya priyam sakham

hindi: बल बुद्धि विद्या देहु मोहि, हरहु कलेश विकार।
english: Grant me strength, wisdom and learning — remove my afflictions and impurities
roman: Bal buddhi vidya dehu mohi, harahu kalesh vikaar

hindi: संकटमोचन हनुमान, जय जय जय बजरंगबली॥
english: Sankatamochana Hanuman — victory, victory, victory to the thunderbolt-limbed hero
roman: Sankat mochan Hanuman, jaya jaya jaya Bajrangabali

english: Whoever reads this Maruti Stotra daily with devotion and effort
roman: Marutis stotram yah pathet nityam bhaktya prayatnatah

hindi: हनुमत्प्रसादाद् बलं विद्यां सुखं च लभते नरः॥
english: By Hanuman's grace that person attains strength, learning and happiness
roman: Hanumat prasadad balam vidyam sukham cha labhate narah
